title: Wallenia pendula
taxonomy: Walleinia pendula is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the "myrtle family" and includes approximately 180 genera and 3,000 to 4,000 species. Within the Myrsinaceae family, Wallenia pendula belongs to the genus Wallenia, which comprises about 100 species of plants. The exact classification of Wallenia pendula is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the clade Eudicots. The exact classification is a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to change based on new findings.
